title: Chassalia subcordatifolia

This family consists of approximately 600 genera and over 13,000 species of flowering plants. Chassalia subcordatifolia is further classified within the genus Chassalia, which is a small genus of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. The genus Chassalia is part of the tribe Spermacoceae, which is a group of flowering plants known for their small, fragrant flowers and distinctive leaf morphology.
